headline: Considering Tokenizing Every Asset Class: Morgan Stanley's Oldenburg
summary: Amy Oldenburg, head of digital asset strategy at Morgan Stanley, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Morgan Stanley has bolstered its digital asset business in recent months. In January, the company named Oldenburg to her new role, and also filed for Bitcoin, Ether and Solana ETFs. Morgan Stanley partnered with Zerohash to allow E*Trade clients to trade digital assets starting this year.

headline: 1GT Portfolio Investment Huel to be Acquired by Danone
summary: NEW YORK, March 24, 2026--Morgan Stanley Investment Management announced today that Huel, one of the first investments made by the 1GT climate private equity strategy, has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Danone, a world-leading food and beverage company.

headline: How The i3 Verticals (IIIV) Narrative Is Shifting After Analyst Target Cuts
summary: i3 Verticals is back in focus after analysts trimmed price targets by $6 and $2, even as the fair value estimate holds steady at 31.33. Those shifts capture a split view, with some analysts seeing the cuts as a reset that makes expectations more realistic, while others read them as a warning that earlier growth assumptions were too upbeat. As you read on, you will see how these changes shape the evolving analyst story and what to watch next in that debate. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...

headline: Mohamed El-Erian Flags Apollo's 5% Withdrawal Cap As Credit Stress Signal
summary: Mohamed El-Erian flags Apollo's 5% fund withdrawal cap as a warning sign for the private credit market amid growing liquidity pressures.
